column1: TROPICS | NHC increases chance of development near Florida to 80% as low pressure tracks along the northern Cuban coast toward the eastern Gulf.

I moved to Tennessee 17 years ago from Oldsmar and have a flight scheduled to fly into Clearwater on Monday. Ugh..if I were a betting girl it would be a good bet that I will be delayed. My first trip back to Florida in 9 years. What a welcome home!!
Oldsmar has been rezoned a few more times and is now more of a flood zone but have not seen anything yet

I hope it stays that way. I lived in 3 different locations in Oldsmar over my 15 years of living there and each one was a flood zone. It's on the bay. All you can do if you want to live there is to be properly insured and prepared for the worst. I know there has been a lot of changes in Oldsmar in the 17 years we have been gone. I'm looking forward to seeing what they've done to that once little old sleepy town.
stores and places to eat, but a good handful closed dt to Covid stuff.
well, be glad you don’t live here and have to worry about your home and family being safe & secure. Might want to schedule your FL vacations outside of hurricane season.

I wish this was just a Florida vacation that I am coming for. Family matters are the reason for my travel. I do have family that lives in Clearwater, so I have family to worry about during these times.
I can't believe it's been 17 years already!
Welcome back to the party!!
time has flown by!!! I'm hoping I can get there!!

this is nothing to what that was

Hi, we’re Dutchies visiting Florida for the summer.
We’re heading to Tampa and Clearwater today. We’ll be staying there for 6 days. Will it be ok to go to these destinations or do we need to rearrange our plans? And if so where to?
We’d appreciate any advice since its hard to find info for tourists! 🙂
Thank You!
sure, just plan on some indoor activities for a couple days instead of paddle boarding and kayaking.

Come and enjoy!!

Understand your concern. Just keep watching the news updates. Living in South Florida for over 50 years I've learned that with these storms, they can change their minds anytime. Keep watching. Have a safe trip.

hier ook dutchies in Florida. We plannen onze activiteiten gewoon zoals gepland en volgen wat meer het nieuws en indien nodig reageren we daarop. Wij verblijven wel in de regio Orlando. Ons dagje Hollywood Studio’s voor morgen ( zaterdag ) gepland laten we vooralsnog gewoon doorgaan.
